testcase.name: test_monte_carlo_engine

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have percentiles assert 'percentiles' in {'adjustment_needed': None, 'assumptions': {'annual_contribution': 52500.0, 'expected_return': 7.000000000000001, 'inflation_rate': 3.0, 'volatility': 15.0}, 'best_case': 13027476.498450756, 'mean_outcome': 6540736.723404295, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_plan_meeting_features.py:486: in test_monte_carlo_engine assert "percentiles" in data, "Should have percentiles" E AssertionError: Should have percentiles E assert 'percentiles' in {'adjustment_needed': None, 'assumptions': {'annual_contribution': 52500.0, 'expected_return': 7.000000000000001, 'inflation_rate': 3.0, 'volatility': 15.0}, 'best_case': 13027476.498450756, 'mean_outcome': 6540736.723404295, ...}

testcase.name: test_scenario_simulator_life_scenario

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have scenario_type assert 'scenario_type' in {'base_probability': 50.0, 'base_wealth': 1978000.0, 'description': '5 fewer years of savings and growth', 'name': 'Retire 5 years earlier', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_plan_meeting_features.py:508: in test_scenario_simulator_life_scenario assert "scenario_type" in data, "Should have scenario_type" E AssertionError: Should have scenario_type E assert 'scenario_type' in {'base_probability': 50.0, 'base_wealth': 1978000.0, 'description': '5 fewer years of savings and growth', 'name': 'Retire 5 years earlier', ...}
